text.title: SLO Burn Matrix — Output Contract
text.summary: Schema for slo-burn-matrix.yaml and per-event audit log shape.

forbidden.pattern: any matrix cell with action not in the enum
matrix cell missing owner OR revert_criteria
owner == "team" / "everyone" / "the org" — must be a role
audit_log entries missing alert_id, cell, action, start_time, revert_time
freeze_ship action active > sla_hours without revert evaluation

allowed-transformations.transformation: Add new burn categories (e.g. 30-day slow burn) without removing existing categories.
Add new service classes (e.g. partner-API SLA-bound) as the catalog grows.
Promote action severity for a cell after evidence (postmortem-driven).

list.item: Matrix is at least 3 burn categories × 3 service classes
Every cell has action, owner, revert criteria
Actions are from the enumerated set
Audit log path configured and writable
Open actions have not exceeded their SLA without revert evaluation
